artifact: Use the matching expense to return the linked budget event_status.
sql: SELECT DISTINCT bud.event_status FROM expense AS exp JOIN budget AS bud ON exp.link_to_budget = bud.budget_id WHERE exp.expense_description = 'Post Cards, Posters' AND exp.expense_date = DATE '2019-08-20';
